title: Turkey Says NATO Defenses Shot Down a Third Iranian Missile
summary_full: Turkey did not say where the missile was intercepted. But residents near Incirlik Air Base, which hosts U.S. troops, reported hearing sirens and a loud boom.
summary_public: Turkey did not say where the missile was intercepted. But residents near Incirlik Air Base, which hosts U.S. troops, reported hearing sirens and a loud boom.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Turkey Says NATO Defenses Shot Down a Third Iranian Missile
